name: @onderling/recipe-loader
description: B #64 — loader + validator for AUTHORED REMOTE recipes: a portable {capabilities, settings, surfaces, freedoms} circle-configuration bundle hosted off-app and run locally. Fetch + trust (verify) are INJECTED so it's testable offline and deny-by-default. Pure loader/validator — apply-to-live-circle wiring (basis) is a deferred seam. Distinct from basis's in-circle kringRecipe broadcast.
